debug_info.goal:
ι : Type
oSpec : OracleSpec ι
σ : Type
init : ProbComp σ
impl : QueryImpl oSpec (StateT σ ProbComp)
Statement Witness : Type
rel : Set (Statement × Witness)
⊢ ∀ (stmtIn : Statement) (witIn : Witness) (prover : Prover oSpec Statement Witness Statement Witness !p[])
    (i : !p[].ChallengeIdx),
    Pr[fun x =>
        ∃ witMid,
          ¬@Verifier.StateFunction.id.match_1 (fun x => Statement → Transcript x !p[] → Witness → Prop) (↑i).castSucc
                (fun isLt stmtIn x witIn => (stmtIn, witIn) ∈ rel) stmtIn x.1
                ((↑i).elim0 stmtIn (Transcript.concat x.2.1 x.1) witMid) ∧
            @Verifier.StateFunction.id.match_1 (fun x => Statement → Transcript x !p[] → Witness → Prop) (↑i).succ
              (fun isLt stmtIn x witIn => (stmtIn, witIn) ∈ rel) stmtIn (Transcript.concat x.2.1 x.1) witMid |
        do
        let __do_lift ← init
        ((simulateQ (Verifier.rbrSoundness_queryImpl ι oSpec 0 !p[] σ)).toFun
                (Transcript (↑i).castSucc !p[] × !p[].Challenge i × (oSpec + fun i => !p[].Challenge i).QueryLog) do
                let __discr ← Prover.runWithLogToRound (↑i).castSucc stmtIn witIn prover
                let challenge ← liftM (!p[].getChallenge i)
                pure (__discr.1.1, challenge, __discr.2)).run'
            __do_lift] ≤
      ↑(0 i)

proof:
intro stmtIn witIn prover i
  exfalso
  exact Fin.elim0 i.1
